description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of wood paneling on the exterior. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The house features a spacious driveway leading to a detached garage, and is surrounded by several mature trees and landscaped greenery. The rooftop includes multiple skylights and what appears to be a rooftop terrace or deck area. The rear of the house opens onto a wooden patio, ideal for outdoor living and entertaining. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, large glass windows, wood paneling, a detached garage, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, detached garage, and several trees.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the wooden patio, backyard greenery, and rooftop terrace features.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the expansive glass windows, wooden deck, and detached garage to the right.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, side windows, and the arrangement of trees and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass door, small steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade
